{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Corrupted ones
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Corrupted ones]] are described as being warped and twisted by their own powers, similar to the [[dreadbeasts]] of the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
